dailyNews.description: United States officials are issuing contradictory statements on the war's timeline and objectives.

dailyNews.title: Scott Bessent says ‘US Navy, possibly with coalition, will escort vessels through Strait of Hormuz’
dailyNews.description: The comments came as global oil prices surged above $100 a barrel and tanker traffic through the key waterway slowed sharply amid fears of further disruptions.

dailyNews.title: Iran vows to make Trump pay for ‘grave miscalculation’ if US escalates war
dailyNews.description: Ali Larijani responds to US threat to hit Iran's power infrastructure, saying the 'whole region will go dark'.

dailyNews.title: LDF’s development narrative in Kollam constituency will face a stiff challenge from UDF
dailyNews.description: While the constituency has traditionally leaned towards the left, the Congress sprang a major surprise by winning Kollam Corporation in the recent local body elections. The BJP too has steadily raised its vote share

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court verdict on OBC creamy layer a victory for social justice: T.N. CM Stalin
Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
dailyNews.description: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

dailyNews.title: How oil is at the center of the US-Israel war with Iran
dailyNews.description: As oil prices rise, the US, Israel and Iran seem ready to keep fighting no matter the costs.

dailyNews.title: ICC drops the investigation into whether US sanctions on Venezuela count as crimes against humanity
dailyNews.description: The International Criminal Court has ended its review of whether US sanctions on Venezuela count as crimes against humanity, citing insufficient proof of intent, though sanctions may have worsened hardships

dailyNews.title: US Shooting: Car Crashes Into Synagogue In Michigan; Active Shooter Situation
dailyNews.description: Authorities respond to incident at Temple Israel in West Bloomfield as police increase security across nearby communities.

dailyNews.title: FBI reports ‘active shooter situation’ at Michigan synagogue in the US
dailyNews.description: Law enforcement officials have reported gunfire near the Temple Israel Synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan.

dailyNews.title: Trump Issues Big Statement After Iran Wishes To Withdraw From FIFA World Cup
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump's comments came just two days after he told FIFA chief Gianni Infantino the Iranian players would be welcome despite the Middle East war.

dailyNews.description: Tehran denies laying mines in the strategic waterway and warns nations backing US-Israel action may not get safe passage.

dailyNews.title: Smoke Rises From Roof, Shooter Active After Truck Crashes Into US Synagogue
dailyNews.description: Police are responding to reports of an "active shooter" at a synagogue outside Detroit, where smoke is billowing from the roof.

dailyNews.title: Two in critical condition after shooting at Old Dominion University in US
dailyNews.description: Authorities say suspect is dead after opening fire in university building in latest shooting on US university campus.

dailyNews.title: Congress urges government to hold an all‑party meeting on women’s quota law
dailyNews.description: The government had reached out to at least two parties — the Congress and the Samajwadi Party — seeking their opinion on advancing the timeline for implementing the legislation

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Trump administration considers waiving Jones Act; here's all you need to know about it
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is considering a temporary waiver of the Jones Act to keep energy and agricultural shipments moving between US ports amid supply disruptions linked to the Iran conflict. The move aims to ease rising fuel prices by allowing foreign ships to transport goods domestically.

dailyNews.description: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

dailyNews.title: West Asia crisis: IGL assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply amid LPG shortage concerns
dailyNews.description: IGL's assurance has come amid global energy market disruptions caused by the escalating conflict in the Middle East involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Heart-wrenching video shows Iranian mother comforting child during bombing: 'Don’t be scared...'
dailyNews.description: A video circulating online shows an Iranian mother comforting her child as explosions echo nearby during reported US-Israeli airstrikes. The emotional clip has drawn widespread attention on social media, highlighting the human cost of the escalating conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran’s World Cup participation may not be ‘appropriate,’ while adding men’s team is still ‘welcome’
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said Iran's national soccer team is "welcome" to play in the World Cup, but cautioned it might not be "appropriate" to compete amid the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: Senate Resoundingly Passes Housing Bill, but Challenges Lie Ahead
dailyNews.description: The lopsided vote to approve the measure was a rare bit of election-year bipartisanship on a major affordability issue, but G.O.P. disputes and President Trump’s disinterest have left its fate uncertain.

dailyNews.title: Judge Dismisses Bulk of Lawsuit Over Trump’s Funding Freeze for Tunnel
dailyNews.description: The case is mostly moot, a federal judge said, because the administration has resumed the flow of more than $200 million in funding that it had temporarily stopped.

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s Election Lie Could Affect 2026 Midterms
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is putting the weight of the federal government behind his false claims about the 2020 election in order to investigate key swing states ahead of the midterms. Nick Corasaniti, a New York Times reporter focusing on elections, homes in on the states that have become the prime targets and why.

dailyNews.title: Trump Endorses Jake Paul, Who Isn't Running for Office
dailyNews.description: The president called Mr. Paul, a boxer and provocative influencer, a “great guy” and predicted that he would run for an elected position.

dailyNews.title: Trump Tempers María Corina Machado’s Political Ambitions in Venezuela
dailyNews.description: President Trump is tempering the political ambitions of María Corina Machado, a Nobel laureate, as he deepens ties with her foes in Venezuela.

dailyNews.title: With New Right-Wing President, Chile Shifts Toward Region’s Conservative, Pro-Trump Alignment
dailyNews.description: The inauguration of Chile’s new president, José Antonio Kast, is the latest milestone in a broader shift toward conservatism and pro-Trump alignment in the region.

dailyNews.title: U.S. releasing 172 million barrels of oil from reserve
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration announced Wednesday that it would release 172 million barrels of oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. James Bikales, energy reporter for Politico, joins CBS News to discuss what impact that may have on gas prices.

dailyNews.title: White House briefed on Michigan synagogue attack
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed about the attack at a Michigan synagogue. CBS News White House reporter Willie James Inman has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs Jones Act waiver amid rising fuel prices, White House says
dailyNews.description: Easing the century-old shipping law could help lower fuel prices as the Iran war pushes crude oil near $100 a barrel, experts say.

dailyNews.title: The White House compares deadly conflict with video games and movies in memeified videos to win support for Iran war
dailyNews.description: The White House’s video Friday began with a brief clip from the video game Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas.

dailyNews.title: As Trump pressures Congress on the SAVE America Act, states push their own versions
dailyNews.description: As push from Republicans and Donald Trump to pass the SAVE America Act have stalled in Congress, efforts are underway at the state level to fill in the gaps.
